subject: GCN 12974 : Errata in the Subject
body:
Brajesh Kumar, Vijay Kumar Bhatt and S. B. Pandey (ARIES, Nainital, India, 
on behalf of larger Indian GRB collaboration).


We made a typo in the subject heading of GCNC 12974.

The correct subject would be  "GRB 120219A: optical observations".

We apologize for the typo.
